nasb.text: “Cursed shall be the offspring of your body and the produce of your ground, the increase of your herd and the young of your flock.

esv.text: Cursed shall be the fruit of your womb and the fruit of your ground, the increase of your herds and the young of your flock.

cnv.text: 你身所生的、土地所出的、牛生殖的和羊所產的，都必受咒詛。

ccb.text: “妇女所生的，土地所产的，牛羊所生的都必受咒诅。
